seoTitle: Connect Outlook to HubSpot: Email & Calendar Sync
metaDescription: Link Microsoft Outlook email and calendar to HubSpot CRM, enabling two-way logging and meeting sync through a secure OAuth connection.
intro: Linking Outlook to HubSpot syncs both your email conversations and your calendar, so meetings and messages stay connected to the right CRM contact automatically. This guide covers installing the integration from HubSpot's marketplace, authorizing your Microsoft 365 account, and turning on two-way logging. It ends with enabling calendar sync so scheduling stays conflict-free.

steps.heading: Open the App Marketplace
steps.body: Click the Marketplace icon in HubSpot to browse available integrations.

steps.heading: Install the Outlook integration
steps.body: Search for the official Microsoft Outlook email and calendar tool and click Install App.

steps.heading: Authorize Microsoft 365
steps.body: Complete the Microsoft OAuth gateway to grant profile permissions.

steps.heading: Confirm your portal
steps.body: Select your target HubSpot portal and confirm the synchronization handshake.

steps.heading: Set logging rules
steps.body: Toggle two-way email logging and adjust filter lists for sensitive records.

steps.heading: Enable calendar sync
steps.body: Turn on real-time meeting syncing and auto-booking features, then run a test event to confirm it works.

faq.question: Does this sync my Outlook calendar as well as email?
faq.answer: Yes, the integration covers both email logging and calendar syncing to help avoid scheduling conflicts.

faq.question: Is the email logging one-way or two-way?
faq.answer: It's bi-directional, so communications from both Outlook and HubSpot can be captured depending on your settings.

faq.question: Can I exclude sensitive email threads from logging?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust filter lists to keep sensitive records out of the automatic logging.

faq.question: Do I need a separate add-in to log emails from my inbox?
faq.answer: The HubSpot Sales Outlook add-in is worth installing for logging emails directly from your inbox, alongside the calendar and email sync.
